name: Pork Chop Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow bowl, combine the flour, salt and pepper; dredge pork chops.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet; cook pork chops for 4-5 minutes per side or until browned. Place in a single layer in an ungreased 13-in x 9-in baking dish.
3. Combine soup, broth, ginger and 1/2 cup sour cream; pour over chops. Sprinkle with half of the onions.
4. Cover and bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes.
5. Stir remaining sour cream into sauce. Top chops with remaining onions. Return to the oven, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
